creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Backported to /quarterly because this also fixed multimedia/kooha crash after pressing Record button. Kooha itself links against libutil and libutil is linked via some of Kooha dependencies (gstreamer1, gstreamer1-plugins, gtk4, graphene, libadwaita, pango, harfbuzz, gdk-pixbuf2).

* thread #1, name = 'kooha', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x0)
    frame #0: 0x000031afd911e52b libc.so.7`strspn(s=0x0000000000000000, charset=":") at strspn.c:51:5
   48           u_long tbl[(UCHAR_MAX + 1) / LONG_BIT];
   49           int idx;
   50
-> 51           if(*s == '\0')
   52                   return (0);
   53
   54   #if LONG_BIT == 64      /* always better to unroll on 64-bit architectures */
(lldb) bt
